{{CargoClone
|name=Lucian Argentlily
|rank=red
|cabin=1
|id=1024
|gene1={race} HARD +50
|gene2={race} AFFCT +50
|gene3=For Round 1, All ELMT DMG +2.5%
|gene4=Per 60 Minions in battle:
> Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=Crit DMG +0.9%
|gene6=Per 60 Minions in battle:
> Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=Crit DMG +1.5%
|}}
